concerns.detail: Deletion removes the phrase '我是毕业的学生' (I am a graduated student), which establishes the source's credibility as an eyewitness with legitimate standing to observe the advisor's conduct. Replacing this credibility marker with a rebuttal challenges the observation's legitimacy without removing the substantive claim about the funding issue, suggesting an attempt to suppress the perceived authority of the criticism.

Insertion contains the unsupported character judgment '混不下去了' (couldn't survive/get along) regarding an advisor's professional competence, presented as vague gossip ('不是说...吗') without citing concrete advising practices or evidence, constituting a pure personal attack on character.
concerns.excerpt: 不是说在原学校混不下去了，然后去别的学校了？
